title: Enchanting Edit Table
description: Through the Enchanting Edit Table, you can transfer and split enchanting!
body:
# Enchanting Edit Table
## You can transfer or split enchanting through the EnchantingEditTable!
**Before using this datapack, please copy it to the resourcepacks folder, Otherwise the texture and model will not display properly!**
- Enchantment Extraction
    - Put feathers, ink bottle, and books on the the matched slot in right side. Add enchanted item in the left slot and click the button to transfer the enchantment that item has into an enchanted book.
- Enchanted Book Split
    - RSame steps but replace the feather with scissors, place the enchanting book in the left slot, and click the button to split it.
### [Recipes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchanting-edit-table/gallery)
